name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service offering domestic and international money sending/receiving, check cashing, and bill payment services through 26+ locations in the Kansas City area.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company operating globally with a significant presence in the Kansas City metropolitan area. The company operates through a network of agent locations including retail partnerships with major retailers like Walmart and CVS, as well as independent money services businesses such as Ace Cash Express, El Centenario, and various specialty stores.

MoneyGram's core services include sending and receiving money domestically and internationally, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services. Their Kansas City network includes 26+ locations spread across both Kansas and Missouri, with varying hours of operation—some locations open as early as 7:00 AM while others operate until midnight. Customers can access services both online and in-person at physical locations.

The company distinguishes itself through its extensive agent network, allowing customers to conduct transfers at convenient retail locations rather than dedicated storefronts only. The dual online and offline capability provides flexibility for different customer preferences. Integration with major retailers provides accessibility and extended hours at some locations (like Pronto Stop Liquor operating until 11:59 PM).

MoneyGram's main limitation for consumers is its reliance on agent locations with varying hours and services—not all partners may offer all services. The Kansas City locator page functions primarily as a branch finder rather than providing detailed fee, rate, or service availability information. For price-sensitive consumers, specific cost comparisons require contacting individual locations.
pros: 26+ locations across Kansas City metro area providing extensive geographic accessibility
Operates through major retail partners (Walmart, CVS) offering convenient integrated services
Extended hours available at select locations (Pronto Stop Liquor open until 11:59 PM)
Both online and in-person service options for money transfers
Independent money services agents (Ace Cash Express locations) alongside retail partners
Domestic and international money transfer capabilities from single platform
Bill payment services available at multiple locations
cons: No specific fee or exchange rate information displayed on location pages
Highly variable hours across locations (7:00 AM to midnight) requiring verification before visiting
Service availability may differ by location—not all agents offer identical service menus
Website provides location finder only without competitive rate comparison tools
Limited transparency on pricing until customer contacts specific location
best_for: International money senders needing convenient retail-based transfer points
Consumers seeking check cashing services integrated with grocery/retail shopping
Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing accessible money transfer services
Bilingual consumers in Kansas City with international family payment needs
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers needing convenient, retail-accessible money transfer and check cashing services across the Kansas City area, particularly those with international transfer needs. The main caveat is that fees, rates, and specific service availability vary significantly by agent location, requiring direct contact for pricing details before use.
services: In-person transfer services at retail locations
